records.question: Which departments are located in the Whitman building, have at least one course, have at least one instructor named Wieland with a salary of at least 124651.41, and have at least one student with at most 99 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.building = 'Whitman' AND instructor.salary >= 124651.41 AND instructor.name = 'Wieland' AND student.tot_cred <= 99
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.dept_name
FROM department d
WHERE d.building = 'Whitman'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM course c WHERE c.dept_name = d.dept_name
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM instructor i 
    WHERE i.dept_name = d.dept_name 
    AND i.name = 'Wieland' 
    AND i.salary >= 124651.41
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM student s 
    WHERE s.dept_name = d.dept_name 
    AND s.tot_cred <= 99
)

records.question: What departments with courses, instructors, and students have a budget of at most 406557.93?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.budget <= 406557.93
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.dept_name
FROM department d
WHERE d.budget <= 406557.93
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM course c WHERE c.dept_name = d.dept_name)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM instructor i WHERE i.dept_name = d.dept_name)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM student s WHERE s.dept_name = d.dept_name)

records.question: Which departments are located in the Mercer building and have an instructor named Pimenta as well as enrolled students?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE instructor.name = 'Pimenta' AND department.building = 'Mercer'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.dept_name
FROM department d
JOIN instructor i ON d.dept_name = i.dept_name
JOIN student s ON d.dept_name = s.dept_name
WHERE d.building = 'Mercer'
AND i.name = 'Pimenta'

records.question: Which departments have a budget of 573745.09 and are located in Whitman, offering the Calculus course with 4 credits, and have a student named Szczerban with at most 97 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE student.name = 'Szczerban' AND course.credits = 4 AND department.budget = 573745.09 AND department.building = 'Whitman' AND course.title = 'Calculus' AND student.tot_cred <= 97
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.dept_name
FROM department d
JOIN course c ON d.dept_name = c.dept_name
JOIN student s ON d.dept_name = s.dept_name
WHERE d.budget = 573745.09
  AND d.building = 'Whitman'
  AND c.title = 'Calculus'
  AND c.credits = 4
  AND s.name = 'Szczerban'
  AND s.tot_cred <= 97

records.question: Which departments have a budget of at least 441840.92 and offer the 3-credit course titled Astronautics, where the instructor named Hau teaches and the student named Ashmi has at most 95 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.budget >= 441840.92 AND course.credits = 3 AND student.tot_cred <= 95 AND instructor.name = 'Hau' AND student.name = 'Ashmi' AND course.title = 'Astronautics'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.dept_name
FROM department d
JOIN course c ON d.dept_name = c.dept_name
JOIN section s ON c.course_id = s.course_id
JOIN teaches t ON s.course_id = t.course_id AND s.sec_id = t.sec_id AND s.semester = t.semester AND s.year = t.year
JOIN instructor i ON t.ID = i.ID
JOIN takes tk ON s.course_id = tk.course_id AND s.sec_id = tk.sec_id AND s.semester = tk.semester AND s.year = tk.year
JOIN student st ON tk.ID = st.ID
WHERE d.budget >= 441840.92
AND c.title = 'Astronautics'
AND c.credits = 3
AND i.name = 'Hau'
AND st.name = 'Ashmi'
AND st.tot_cred <= 95
